mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PROFILE_VISIT.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_PROFILE_VISIT (ID, OWNER_MEMBER_ID, VISITOR_MEMBER_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{ownerMemberId}, #{visitorMemberId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT VISITOR_MEMBER_ID) FROM TBL_PROFILE_VISIT WHERE OWNER_MEMBER_ID = #{ownerId} AND TRUNC(VISITED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
